data.title: Tesla Vs. GM: This Auto Stock Has Picked More Pace For Investors This Year
data.description: Tesla's shares have dropped by about 13% year-to-date, those of General Motors have risen by about 49%, marking the deep differences between the two carmakers.

data.title: Enphase Energy Posts Downbeat Results, Joins McDonald's, Seagate And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Wednesday's Pre-Market Session
'Dogecoin Killer' Shiba Inu Burn Rate Soars 6,750%: Watch This Indicator Potentially Kicking Off A 355% Rally, Says Trader
data.description: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is gaining attention from traders after a dramatic rise in its burn rate and daily transactions.

data.title: Strong Q3 For Vertiv: Revenue Rises 19%, But Stock Takes A Hit
data.description: VRT stock down after reporting strong Q3 results and raising full-year guidance. Revenue and EPS beat consensus, organic orders up 17%

data.title: Hong Kong Bans WhatsApp And Google Drive On Civil Servants' Work Computers Citing Security Concerns
data.description: The Hong Kong government has prohibited the use of popular apps such as WhatsApp, WeChat, and Google Drive on civil servants' work computers. The decision was made due to potential security threats.
